text: I recently had the pleasure of dining at this charming American breakfast and brunch spot, and I must say, it was a truly delightful experience. From the moment I walked in, I was struck by the cozy and inviting atmosphere, complete with warm decor and a friendly staff. Our server was attentive and knowledgeable, happy to answer all our questions about the menu and make recommendations. The food was absolutely delicious, with creative dishes like the breakfast burrito and avocado toast that were both flavorful and generously portioned. While the prices were slightly higher than I expected, I felt that the quality and quantity of the food made it well worth the cost. My only suggestion would be to improve the parking options, as street parking can be a challenge in this area. Overall, however, I would highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for a tasty and welcoming breakfast or brunch experience.
